title: MD
biography: John Charnley was a British orthopedic surgeon who invented the modern hip replacement. His low-friction arthroplasty using UHMWPE and bone cement transformed the lives of millions of arthritis patients.
aiSummary: John Charnley is a orthopedic surgery specialist at Wrightington Hospital. Based in Wrightington.

timeline.title: Invented modern hip replacement
timeline.description: Developed the low-friction arthroplasty using high-density polyethylene and acrylic bone cement

timeline.title: Established hip replacement as standard
timeline.description: By this time, the Charnley hip had been proven in thousands of patients with excellent long-term results
